brand_identity.name: Finde R
brand_identity.ethos: Urban Zen. Efficient, trusted, yet vibrant.

typography.installation: Ensure fonts are imported in index.css via Google Fonts.

colors.palette_notes: Use 'primary' (Deep Teal) for main buttons in Light Mode. Use 'secondary' (Electric Lime) for highlights, tags, and 'primary' buttons in Dark Mode to ensure visibility.

layout.grid_strategy: Mobile-first. Use 'grid-cols-1' for almost everything on mobile. 'grid-cols-2' for product grids on mobile (tight). 'grid-cols-12' for desktop bento layouts.

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 font-bold tracking-wide transition-all active:scale-95 hover:shadow-lg
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-6 py-4 font-medium bg-muted text-foreground hover:bg-muted/80

cards.listing: rounded-2xl overflow-hidden bg-card border border-border/40 hover:border-primary/20 transition-all hover:shadow-floating group
cards.feature: bg-muted/50 rounded-xl p-6 border border-transparent hover:border-border transition-all

inputs.default: h-12 rounded-xl border-input bg-background px-4 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

navigation.bottom_bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-16 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-border/40 flex justify-around items-center z-50 pb-safe
navigation.top_bar: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full backdrop-blur-md bg-background/80 border-b border-border/40

images.logo_placeholder: Use a simple typographic logo 'Finde R' in Manrope Black font.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text colors meet WCAG AA standards. Use darker shades of primary colors for text.
accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have a visible ring-2 ring-offset-2 focus state.
accessibility.aria_labels: All icon-only buttons must have aria-label.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 44x44px for all mobile touch targets.

instructions_to_main_agent.1: Install 'lucide-react' for icons and 'clsx' 'tailwind-merge' for utils.
instructions_to_main_agent.2: Create a 'layout.js' (or .tsx) that handles the PWA shell (bottom nav on mobile, sidebar on desktop).
instructions_to_main_agent.3: Use 'sonner' for all toast notifications. Do not use default alerts.
instructions_to_main_agent.4: For the 'Map View', simulate it with a static image background and absolute positioned 'Price Pills' if a real map library is too complex to set up without API keys. If using a library, use 'react-map-gl' or 'leaflet'.
instructions_to_main_agent.5: Implement the 'Owner Post Wizard' as a multi-step form with progress bar.
instructions_to_main_agent.6: Ensure 'ScrollArea' or 'overflow-y-auto' is used correctly so the bottom nav never overlaps content.
instructions_to_main_agent.7: Do not center everything. Use left alignment for text to improve readability.
instructions_to_main_agent.8: Use the 'Urban Zen' color palette strictly. No generic blue.
instructions_to_main_agent.9: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and inputs.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not get biased with the examples in the prompt.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯📚🎭🎬🎪🎉🎊🎁🎀🎂🍰🎈🎨🎰💰💵💳🏦💎🪙💸🤑📊📈📉💹🔢🏆🥇 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts
Sonner component are located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx
